ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "postal_abbreviation" TEXT /* Postal abbreviation for the state */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code representing the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_classes" (
  "law_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each law class */,
  "parent_law_class_id" INTEGER /* Parent law class ID */,
  "law_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the law class */,
  "law_class_description" TEXT /* Description of the law class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("law_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_subtypes" (
  "law_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each law subtype */,
  "law_subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the law subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the law subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("law_subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gun_types" (
  "gun_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gun type */,
  "gun_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the gun type (e.g., handgun, long gun) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gun type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gun_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "law_id" TEXT /* ID of the law that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., modify, repeal) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "change_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supersessions" (
  "supersession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supersession record */,
  "law_id" TEXT /* ID of the law that is superseded */,
  "supersession_date" TEXT /* Date of supersession */,
  "supersession_details" TEXT /* Details regarding the supersession */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supersession_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Encrypted password of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the database */,
  "law_id" TEXT /* ID of the law that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the access */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
